preflightRows.name: Human start decision
preflightRows.requiredBeforeWrite: A human reviewer explicitly confirms identity, scope, blank notes, source-fit sequence, and write intent.

preflightRows.name: Dry run and overwrite protection
preflightRows.requiredBeforeWrite: Run dry-run and protection checks immediately before any write command.

preflightRows.name: Blank note scaffold
preflightRows.evidence: 12 lesson cards and 72 blank note fields.
preflightRows.requiredBeforeWrite: Do not paste generated prompts or examples into the real overlay.

preflightRows.name: Direct candidate decisions
preflightRows.requiredBeforeWrite: Resolve confirm, downgrade, or blocked decisions in real sourceFitNotes.

preflightRows.name: sourceFitNotes acceptance
preflightRows.evidence: 5/5 positive controls and 6/6 negative cases passed.
preflightRows.requiredBeforeWrite: Run after real sourceFitNotes exist; generated controls are not evidence.

preflightRows.name: Real overlay diff audit
preflightRows.requiredBeforeWrite: Run after write mode to inspect real filled fields, unsafe text, copying risk, and structure.

preflightRows.name: Evidence intake
preflightRows.requiredBeforeWrite: Only run intake after completion, diff audit, note lint, and sourceFitNotes acceptance pass on real notes.

preflightRows.name: Launch readiness
preflightRows.requiredBeforeWrite: Do not infer internal trial, release, commercial readiness, or production readiness from preflight.

stopConditions: Stop if docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json already exists before write mode.
Stop if no human reviewer has explicitly chosen to begin real note-taking.
Stop if generated prompts, samples, or rehearsal text are copied into real notes.
Stop if direct candidates are treated as confirmed without real sourceFitNotes.
Stop if sourceFitNotes contain approval, release, production, trading, performance, broker/order, automation, real-money, or copied-source wording.
Stop if yellow, red, or research_only sources are proposed as learner-facing evidence.
boundary: This preflight summary is a manual pre-write operations gate only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, confirm source use, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, grant internal-trial readiness, or make the product production-ready.
